acceptance_targets: [ch11-prose-001] Pass if a line-by-line read of the revised passages anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:3, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:9, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:501, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:617 finds full clauses rather than noun-label bursts or dropped-auxiliary fragments; fail if any of those beats still read like shorthand notes rather than narrated sentences.

[ch11-craft-001] Pass if the revised sentence at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:583 names only what Mina can currently remember, perceive, or infer; fail if it still references a future discovery, unrevealed evidence, or any knowledge unavailable to her in-scene.

[ch11-prose-002] Pass if at least three of the cited beats now land through direct image, action, or positive phrasing rather than a negation-and-replacement turn, and no more than two of those passages still rely on 'not X' correction phrasing; fail if the same self-canceling construction still governs most of the cited lines.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if a line-by-line read of the revised passages anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:3, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:9, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:501, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:617 finds full clauses rather than noun-label bursts or dropped-auxiliary fragments; fail if any of those beats still read like shorthand notes rather than narrated sentences.
findings.problem: The chapter repeatedly leans on clipped narration and label-stack fragments for force, including dropped-auxiliary beats like Mina's visual scan at the dock and the deferred-invoice/tide-note passages. That violates the constitution's ban on elliptical clipping in narration and turns compression into a repeated house tic instead of scene-specific rhythm.
findings.rewrite_direction: Recast the fragment-heavy passages anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:3, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:9, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:501, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:617 into grammatically complete clauses. Keep the compression and sensory pressure, but restore omitted verbs/auxiliaries and let the cadence come from sequencing, not from note-form fragments.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised sentence at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:583 names only what Mina can currently remember, perceive, or infer; fail if it still references a future discovery, unrevealed evidence, or any knowledge unavailable to her in-scene.
findings.problem: The aside about 'the logbook she did not yet know she would find there' breaks the style-bible close-third contract by importing future knowledge Mina cannot presently have. It also weakens suspense by pre-announcing the annex evidence instead of letting the next chapter discover it on the page.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:583, keep Mina inside present knowledge only: the remembered concrete throat of the annex, the BrightCurrent signage, and the tide logic that suggests a foot route. Remove the future-aware logbook reference and let chapter 12 reveal the artifact when Mina actually encounters it.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if at least three of the cited beats now land through direct image, action, or positive phrasing rather than a negation-and-replacement turn, and no more than two of those passages still rely on 'not X' correction phrasing; fail if the same self-canceling construction still governs most of the cited lines.
findings.problem: The prose overuses the same negation-and-correction move ('not X', 'not the word', 'not enough and not nothing') to refine emotional beats. By the middle and late scenes that repeated self-canceling construction starts to flatten the chapter's cadence and makes distinct observations arrive in the same sentence shape.
findings.rewrite_direction: Vary the emotional turns anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:17, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:43, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:195, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:245, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:315, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:367. Keep the distinctions, but rewrite at least several of those beats as direct positive description, gesture, or sensory consequence instead of another negation-and-replacement sentence frame.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the book's uncomfortable overlaps: desire entangled with access, wonder contaminated by biotech history, class need shaping erotic choices, and ecological harm rendered at creature scale. When a scene sits on the edge between restraint and retreat, keep the pressure visible through bodies, residue, changed behavior, or social cost. If an exact detail would make the material more embarrassing, more sensual, or more morally compromising, that is usually the detail to keep.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If sex, ecological damage, class shame, or moral compromise are softened into tasteful fog at the moment they should bite, the scene has failed and must be rewritten at higher specificity.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the norm in spoken dialogue; uncontracted forms should signal deliberate emphasis, institutional performance, or a character-specific formality shift.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate compression and dilation aggressively: single-scene nocturnes, comic paperwork chapters, quiet survey chapters, domestic weather chapters, confrontational set pieces, and aftermath chapters should sit beside each other without repeating the same rhythm two chapters in a row.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete, coastal, and exact without brochure prettiness; scientific and bureaucratic terms may appear when the characters would think or speak through them, but they should stay embodied by consequence.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third centered on Mina Cordero, with free-indirect access tight enough to track bodily desire, shame, and observational obsession without collapsing into confessional summary
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Supple sentence music that can hold humidity, rot, and erotic charge, then cut hard into blunt compression at moments of humiliation, procedural friction, or ecological damage.
